title: UN human rights chief calls on US to conclude probe into Iran school strike
summary_full: The strike - which killed at least 168 people, mostly children - "evoked a visceral horror", Volker Türk said.
summary_public: The strike - which killed at least 168 people, mostly children - "evoked a visceral horror", Volker Türk said.
